'''Kadok III''' was a [[Star/Legends|star]] located in the [[Tertiary Kadok system]],<ref name="AIR" /> a part of the [[Kadok Regions/Legends|Kadok Regions]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="AIR" />

The innermost, [[Kadok III-A]], was a searing-[[Temperature/Legends|hot]] rock world with eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of its own. The second orbit was occupied by another searing rock planet, Kadok III-B, which had fifteen natural satellites. Kadok III-C, a barren rock planet with a single moon, occupied the third orbital position around its star.<ref name="AIR" />

Further out, [[Guiteica/Legends|Kadok III-D]], commonly known as Guiteica, was a temperate terrestrial world with [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]], [[Water/Legends|glaciers]], [[Forest/Legends|forests]], and huge waterfalls on its surface. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[j'kuutak]]<ref name="AIR" /> and [[Roggwart/Legends|roggwart]] [[Species/Legends|creatures]]<ref name="EpGuide">''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Episode Guide]]''</ref> as well as the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] species. The outermost orbit around Kadok III was occupied by the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type planet [[Kadok III-E]] and its seventy-five moons.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kadok III was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tertiary Kadok [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Kadok III, in grid square J-4.<ref name="TEA Kadok" />
